channel.title: Adrian Marikar
channel.description: Notes, builds, and essays by Adrian Marikar.

item.title: My AI App Factory: Hetzner, Hermes, Coolify, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Telegram
item.description: A practical step-by-step guide to using a VPS, multiple Hermes agents, Coolify, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Telegram to build and deploy apps with AI.

item.title: Starting a new blog
item.description: A short opening note on why this space exists and how it will evolve.

item.title: Building small, useful things
item.description: Why small projects are often the fastest way to learn, validate, and compound taste.

item.title: A fast personal website
item.description: The design notes behind this static, lightweight blog.
